METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED.message: The method is not allowed for the requested URL

OBJECT_EMPTY.message: Object cannot be empty, at least one value must exist

INVALID_JSON.message: The JSON provided is invalid, please check the structure and try again

MISSING_ARGUMENTS.message: Some required arguments are missing, please check the request and try again

INVALID_RESPONSE.message: The response obtained by the server is not as expected, please try again later

OPERATION_FAILED.message: An error occurred while trying to perform the operation, please try again later

UNAUTHORIZED.message: You are not authorized to access this resource

EXPIRED.message: The time set for this operation has expired

BODY_EMPTY.message: The body of the request cannot be empty

CONTENT-TYPE.message: The Content-type is not supported or invalid

NOT_FOUND.message: The requested resource was not found or is nonexistent

RATE_LIMITED.message: You have been blocked from accessing the site because you have exceeded the request limit

METHOD_RATE_LIMITED.message: You have been blocked from accessing this method because you have exceeded the request limit

EMAIL_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE.message: The email service is unavailable at the moment

ALREADY_EXISTS.message: This value already exists in the database
